steps.assistant_text: Cross-module masked-twin sweep grouped gl_func_00069E04 with the matched kernel func_800059C0 (kernel_009) in a strict 83-insn signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison showed 0 non-reloc diffs. It is libultra osSendMesg (block while queue full or fail if non-blocking, append msg to ring buffer, wake any waiter on mtqueue). Ported the kernel donor C verbatim to game_libs_ido53_69E04.c at IDO 5.3 -O1; spliced into game_libs_post1b.c.o via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY with donor relocs imported. All OS-API callees collapse to gl_func_00000000; the distinct globals map to D_00000000 / gl_data_00000000 (kept separate to block IDO CSE, all resolve to 0x0). Prior NM-wrap was an in-context approximation (44/84 etc.); the verbatim kernel twin is byte-exact.
